title: ailanthus altissima var. sutchuenensis
intro: Ailanthus altissima var. sutchuenensis, also known as Chinese tree of heaven, is a variety of the tree of heaven plant, native to China and characterized by its broad, pinnately compound leaves and small yellow flowers. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Ailanthus altissima var. sutchuenensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat a range of ailments, from fever and cough to digestive issues and skin problems.
